engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is evaluating a physical product line (steel/plastic/stainless rollers, conveyor systems) via specs, load capacity, applications and a production process — the argument is about the thing working, not trusting a named practitioner or browsing a portfolio.

goal.one_action: request a technical consultation / price quote for rollers or custom machining

structure.archetype_note: Multi-page B2B manufacturer site: overview + product-type pages + custom-machining service + contact, repeated tel/zalo/form quote CTAs.

mapped.observed_as: Sitewide sticky bar 'UY TÍN – KINH NGHIỆM HƠN 10 NĂM...'
Roller Types / Sản phẩm tiêu biểu
Production Process / Quy trình gia công và lắp đặt
Cấu tạo và thông số kỹ thuật (sizing table)
Tại sao khách hàng tin chọn Việt Thống / Giá trị cốt lõi
Technical Consultation (free advice, 2h quote, on-site survey)
Đối tác – Khách hàng tiêu biểu
Thông tin liên hệ / contact form
Gọi kỹ thuật ngay / TƯ VẤN & BÁO GIÁ NGAY!
SẢN PHẨM NỔI BẬT / CON LĂN / VỀ CHÚNG TÔI

confidence.why: fetch_quality is 'rendered' not 'full', so some page bodies (blog posts, exact CTA targets) are partial; but structure, engine, and goal are unambiguous.

gap_findings: Multiple parallel conversion mechanisms (tel hotline + Zalo quote + two Elementor lead forms) coexist as co-primary — taxonomy forces one 'mechanism' pick though B2B manufacturers genuinely lead with phone/Zalo AND form simultaneously.
Product-type pages (con-lan-thep etc.) are catalog-like category pages with specs but no prices/cart — sits between 'features' section and 'catalog' capability.
